evals.prompt: I built an AI agent platform and want to submit it to Altern. What's the process and is the backlink worth it?
evals.expected_output: Explains the submission process (GitHub/Google auth, submit tool details, editorial review), confirms dofollow backlinks, notes the alternatives pages SEO value, and recommends accurate category selection for maximum visibility.

assertions.name: submission_process
assertions.description: Describes the submission steps including authentication method (GitHub or Google) and that there is an editorial review before the listing goes live

assertions.name: dofollow_confirmed
assertions.description: Confirms that Altern provides dofollow backlinks and explains what this means for SEO value

assertions.name: listing_optimization
assertions.description: Provides at least one concrete tip for optimizing the listing, such as choosing a specific category, writing a clear description, or including screenshots

evals.prompt: How does Altern compare to There's An AI For That and Futurepedia for listing my AI tool?
evals.expected_output: Compares the three directories on traffic, focus, backlink type, and audience. Notes TAAFT and Futurepedia have much higher traffic but Altern offers dev-focused curation. Recommends submitting to multiple directories.

assertions.name: traffic_comparison
assertions.description: Compares traffic levels across the directories, noting that TAAFT and Futurepedia have significantly higher traffic than Altern

assertions.name: differentiation
assertions.description: Explains what makes Altern different from the other directories, such as its developer/AI focus, curation approach, or alternatives pages

assertions.name: multi_directory_recommendation
assertions.description: Recommends submitting to multiple AI directories rather than choosing just one, or suggests combining Altern with other directories as part of a broader strategy

evals.prompt: What's the featured listing on Altern? How much does Gold/Silver/Bronze cost?
evals.expected_output: Explains the tiered system (Gold highest, Bronze entry-level), notes featured listings get homepage placement for at least 1 week, and acknowledges that specific pricing is not publicly documented.

assertions.name: tier_system
assertions.description: Describes the featured tier system with Gold, Silver, and Bronze levels and explains the general benefits like homepage placement

assertions.name: pricing_transparency
assertions.description: Acknowledges that featured tier pricing is not publicly listed and suggests contacting the team to inquire

assertions.name: free_tier_value
assertions.description: Explains what the free (standard) listing includes, such as a tool page, dofollow backlink, and placement on alternatives pages
